calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jan-07-2008 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-02-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Richard Hamm, Esq. for Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant: Leon Nhat Nguyen, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant/Cross Plaintiff: Me Truong sued as My Truong.
Exhibit 1 - Cancelled Check #1435 dtd 03-28-06-----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Cancelled Check #1436 dtd 03-28-06-----------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff/Cross Defendant and against the Defendant/Croos-Plaintiff as follows:
Principal $46,965.00
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $335.00, for a Total of $49,800.00
Plus CC 1719 asscessment of $1,500.00.
Counsel to prepare Judgment for signature.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits in open court.

April 25, 2007
Judgment granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2006 Set For Trial On Apr-02-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2006 Continued To Jan-05-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
